name: medusa-mcp
description: Retrieve information from the Medusa documentation to assist you with your Medusa development.

metadata.short_description: Retrieve Medusa documentation for ecommerce development assistance
metadata.mesh_description: Provides access to Medusa documentation. It enables users to retrieve information and guidance directly from the Medusa documentation, assisting them with their Medusa development efforts. Medusa is an open-source headless commerce platform. This MCP helps developers with API references, plugin development, storefront integration, and commerce workflow implementation.
